_meta.purpose: Runtime configuration for the Hatfield McCoy DTF prototype. Non-secret values only — webhook proxy endpoint hides the real Discord URL.

kicksy.comment: Kixxl direct-launch path. Headless builder CTAs go directly to /apps/gangify/builder with verified product/variant/price/store params. The Shopify Online Store product page remains a fallback landing path only; do not route headless traffic through it. Iframe is not the launch path (Shopify X-Frame-Options: DENY). Quote form stays as secondary fallback.

webhook.comment: Form posts here. Vercel Edge Function at /api/intake.js proxies to Discord. Never expose the real webhook URL to the client bundle.

socials.comment: Latest client intake captured 2026-05-12. TikTok N/A, hidden.

site.comment: Set preview_flag_enabled=true via URL param ?preview=true on any page to show the .proto-flag watermark.

cart.comment: Shopify Storefront Cart API checkout enabled for Storefront-visible products. localStorage remains a display cache; checkout source of truth is Shopify cart checkoutUrl.

intake.comment: Form progress ceiling matches Q1..Q12. localStorage draft restore. 15s cooldown between submissions (anti-spam).

operations.same_day_cutoff_status: conflict: Page 3 says 3pm; Page 4 says no same-day pickup cutoff
operations.public_same_day_copy: Contact us for same-day availability. Rush service is available when schedule allows.

collaborator_email_comment: Operational collaborator email for Shopify setup instructions only; not public storefront customer-support copy.

shopify.comment: Public Storefront API token only. Do not place Admin API tokens or private Storefront tokens in this static config.
